name: xmss_pkFromSig(idx, SIG_XMSS, M, PK.seed, ADRS)
label: Algorithm 11

inputs.name: idx
inputs.description: Index of the WOTS+ key within the XMSS tree that was used for signing

inputs.name: PK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte public seed from SLH-DSA public key

inputs.name: ADRS
inputs.description: 32-byte address structure with layer and tree addresses set to the target XMSS tree

outputs.name: node[0]
outputs.description: n-byte XMSS public key (tree root) derived from the signature and message

body_raw: for k from 0 to h' - 1 do
